inputs.label: System Voltage (LL)
inputs.businessContext: Nominal line-to-line voltage of the power system (e.g., 400 V for low voltage).

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal line-to-line voltage of the power system (e.g., 400 V for low voltage).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güç sisteminin nominal faz-faz gerilimi (örneğin, alçak gerilim için 400 V).

inputs.label: Source Impedance
inputs.businessContext: The equivalent impedance of the upstream network (often negligible for transformer-fed systems).

businessContext_i18n.en: The equivalent impedance of the upstream network (often negligible for transformer-fed systems).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yukarı akış şebekesinin eşdeğer empedansı (genellikle transformatör beslemeli sistemlerde ihmal edilebilir).

inputs.label: Transformer Rating
inputs.businessContext: Rated apparent power of the transformer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rated apparent power of the transformer.

inputs.label: Impedance Voltage (%Z)
inputs.businessContext: Percent impedance voltage of the transformer, typically 4–6% for distribution transformers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percent impedance voltage of the transformer, typically 4–6% for distribution transformers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Transformatörün yüzde empedans gerilimi, dağıtım transformatörleri için tipik olarak %4–6.

inputs.label: Cable Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the cable between transformer and fault point.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the cable between transformer and fault point.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Transformatör ile arıza noktası arasındaki kablo uzunluğu.

inputs.label: Cable Cross-Section
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional area of the cable conductor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cross-sectional area of the cable conductor.

inputs.label: Conductor Resistivity
inputs.businessContext: Electrical resistivity of the conductor material (0.0175 for copper, 0.0282 for aluminum).

businessContext_i18n.en: Electrical resistivity of the conductor material (0.0175 for copper, 0.0282 for aluminum).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İletken malzemenin elektriksel özdirenci (bakır için 0,0175, alüminyum için 0,0282).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
